data.name: Settings_AutoSaveHint
data.value: Changes are saved automatically; some require restart.

data.name: Settings_ModeDesc
data.value: Choose run mode. In PPT-only mode the app is hidden until slide show. (Experimental)

data.name: Settings_NewWindowDesc
data.value: Open a new settings window. (In development)

data.name: Settings_PluginsDesc
data.value: Extend Ink Canvas with plugins. Enable, disable, or load custom plugins.

data.name: Startup_UIATopMostHint
data.value: # UIA topmost requires admin to take effect.

data.name: SilentUpdate_Hint
data.value: # Silent update installs when app is idle.

data.name: Channel_Hint
data.value: # Stable for reliability; Preview for new features.

data.name: VersionFix_Hint
data.value: # Download and install latest for current channel.

data.name: SilentUpdate_AfterDownloadHint
data.value: # When silent update is off, you will be prompted after download.

data.name: EraserSize_SwitchHint
data.value: # Takes effect on next area eraser use.

data.name: Canvas_LaunchSeewoVideoShowcaseForWhiteboardBooth
data.value: Whiteboard booth opens Seewo Video Showcase

data.name: Canvas_LaunchSeewoVideoShowcaseForWhiteboardBoothHint
data.value: When enabled, the whiteboard toolbar Booth button launches Seewo Video Showcase (must be installed). When disabled, the built-in booth is used.

data.name: Canvas_InkFadeHint
data.value: # Ink will not be drawn on canvas when enabled.

data.name: Canvas_HideFadeInPenMenuHint
data.value: # Fade control will be hidden in pen context menu.

data.name: Msg_UpdateReady
data.value: Update downloaded. It will install when you close the app.

data.name: Msg_UpdateDownloadFailed
data.value: Update download failed. Please check your network and try again.

data.name: Msg_SkipVersion
data.value: Version {0} skipped; you will not be prompted until a newer version is released.

data.name: Msg_UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Save your ink and restart the app.

data.name: Msg_RestartLimit
data.value: App has restarted 5 times. Auto-restart stopped. Contact the developer or check the system.

data.name: Crash_Desc
data.value: Choose what to do when an unhandled exception occurs:

data.name: Crash_Hint
data.value: # Silent restart: automatically restart without prompt. No action: only log, do not restart.

data.name: Gesture_AutoToggleTwoFinger
data.value: Auto-toggle two-finger move in/out of whiteboard

data.name: Gesture_AutoToggleHint
data.value: # When enabled: leaving canvas disables two-finger move; entering whiteboard enables it.

data.name: Gesture_AllowRotateScaleHint
data.value: # Allows scaling selected ink with two or more fingers (independent of rotate setting).

data.name: Gesture_PalmHint
data.value: # Low: larger area/more touches required (less false positive); High: easier to trigger but may mis-detect fingers.

data.name: InkRecog_ShapeEngineHint
data.value: # Auto: WinRT on 64-bit (Windows 10+), IACore on 32-bit. You can force IACore or WinRT.

data.name: InkRecog_HandwritingBeautify
data.value: WinRT: recognized text to handwriting glyphs

data.name: InkRecog_HandwritingBeautifyHint
data.value: # When the ink correction API runs: WinRT recognizes ink words, then replaces recognized text with outline strokes from a handwriting-style font (default Ink Free / KaiTi / Segoe Script; set handwritingCorrectionFontFamily in Settings JSON). 64-bit + WinRT.

data.name: InkRecog_BlockRectFakePressure
data.value: Block fake pressure on corrected rectangles

data.name: InkRecog_BlockTriFakePressure
data.value: Block fake pressure on corrected triangles

data.name: InkRecog_HighPrecisionHint
data.value: # When enabled, lines longer than the threshold will be straightened. Sensitivity 0.05–2.0: smaller = stricter; larger = easier to treat as straight. High-precision samples every 10px for better judgement.

data.name: Theme_FloatingBarOpacityInPPTHint
data.value: # Takes effect after re-entering slide show

data.name: Theme_ShowTimeInWhiteboard
data.value: Show time and date in whiteboard

data.name: Theme_EnableQuickPanel
data.value: Enable quick panel in docked mode

data.name: PPT_GroupHint
data.value: These settings apply during slide show and override others.

data.name: PPT_KillWppHint
data.value: # When disabled, leftover WPP processes may cause slow close or cannot exit completely.

data.name: PPT_WpsHint1
data.value: # If you only use PowerPoint, do not enable WPS integration. If you use WPS, it is recommended not to use PowerPoint together.

data.name: PPT_WpsLagWarning
data.value: Enabling WPS support may cause lag when closing WPS!

data.name: PPT_WpsSupportHint
data.value: # WPS is supported, but MS Office and WPS cannot be supported at the same time. To enable WPS support, make sure “WPS Office compatibility with third-party systems and software” is enabled in the WPS config tool, otherwise WPS cannot be detected.

data.name: Canvas_HideStrokeWhenSelecting
data.value: Hide ink when exiting board mode

data.name: Canvas_HideStrokeWhenSelectingHint
data.value: # When this option is on, ink will not be shown in PPT mode if not in annotation mode.

data.name: Canvas_ClearInkAlsoClearHistory
data.value: Clear ink history when clearing ink

data.name: PPT_ShowFlipButtons
data.value: Show page-turn buttons in PPT mode

data.name: PPT_OffsetHint
data.value: # Increase for up, decrease for down; 0 = no offset, centered.

data.name: PPT_OffsetHintHorizontal
data.value: # Increase for right, decrease for left; 0 = no offset, centered.

data.name: PPT_PageButtonClickableHint
data.value: # When enabled, clicking the page button opens PowerPoint grid thumbnails. Not supported in WPS.

data.name: PPT_LongPressPageTurnHint
data.value: # When enabled, long-press on PPT page button to turn pages continuously.

data.name: Startup_UIAccessTopMostHint
data.value: # With UIA topmost on, app needs admin to stay on top. To turn off, fully quit then start again; restart will not disable it.

data.name: Startup_SilentUpdateHint
data.value: # Silent update installs when the app is idle; no manual action needed.

data.name: Startup_UpdateChannelHint
data.value: # Stable: reliable updates. Preview: new features with better stability than Beta. Beta: earliest new features.

data.name: Startup_ManualUpdateHint
data.value: # Check and download the latest version now.

data.name: Startup_FixVersionHint
data.value: # Repair downloads the latest build for the selected channel and reinstalls; use to fix broken installs.

data.name: Startup_HistoryRollbackHint
data.value: # Opens a page to manually roll back to an earlier version.

data.name: Startup_SilentUpdateFullHint
data.value: # When silent update is off, you will be prompted after download. When on, every 10 minutes the app checks: 1) within silent-update time window 2) not in writing mode 3) not in canvas. If all pass, it will close and update.

data.name: Startup_TimePeriodHint
data.value: # If end < start, end is next day. If start = end, window is 24h.

data.name: Canvas_EnablePressureTouchHint
data.value: # When on, touch screens that support pressure will show pressure; for devices not recognized by the system.

data.name: Canvas_DisablePressureHint
data.value: # When on, all strokes use uniform thickness; mutually exclusive with pressure-sensitive touch.

data.name: Canvas_EraserSizeHint
data.value: # Change takes effect next time you use area eraser.

data.name: Canvas_HyperbolaAsymptoteHint
data.value: # If not kept, undo-related bugs may occur.

data.name: Canvas_EnableInkFadeHint
data.value: # When on, ink is not committed to canvas; it fades after the set time.

data.name: Canvas_HideInkFadeInPenMenu
data.value: Hide ink fade control in pen menu

data.name: Canvas_HideInkFadeInPenMenuHint
data.value: # When on, the pen context menu will not show the ink fade control.

data.name: Canvas_BrushAutoRestoreHint
data.value: # When on, temporary brush changes will restore at the configured time(s) to the color/opacity/width set here.

data.name: Canvas_SwitchBackAfterEraser
data.value: Switch back to annotation after eraser

data.name: Canvas_SwitchBackAfterEraserHint
data.value: # When on, after erasing, staying idle for a while will switch back to annotation mode.

data.name: Canvas_SwitchBackDelayHint
data.value: # If you erase again within the delay, the timer resets.

data.name: InkRecog_LineEndpointSnappingHint
data.value: # When on, line endpoints near other endpoints will snap and connect.

data.name: PPT_EnterAnnotationOnShow
data.value: Enter annotation mode when starting PPT slide show

data.name: PPT_ConflictWithAutoFold
data.value: Conflicts with "Auto fold when playing PPT" in Automation!

data.name: PPT_TwoFingerGesture
data.value: Allow two-finger gestures in slide show

data.name: PPT_FingerGestureSlide
data.value: Allow finger gesture to turn slides

data.name: PPT_FingerGestureSlideHint
data.value: # When canvas is on, finger swipe (not pen) can turn slides in show mode when canvas has no ink.

data.name: PPT_ShowGestureButtonInShow
data.value: Show gesture buttons in PPT slide show

data.name: PPT_ShowGestureButtonInShowHint
data.value: # When on, gesture buttons are shown in PPT slide show.

data.name: PPT_TimeCapsuleHint
data.value: # When on, show time capsule in PPT show; can replace minimized timer window.

data.name: PPT_ShowQuickPanelInShow
data.value: Show quick panel in PPT slide show

data.name: PPT_ShowQuickPanelInShowHint
data.value: # When off, quick panel is hidden in PPT slide show.

data.name: PPT_AutoScreenshotHint
data.value: # When on, auto-screenshot when turning page with ink on slide.

data.name: PPT_AutoSaveStrokesHint
data.value: # When on, ink is saved when ending slide show and loaded next time (same file and page).

data.name: PPT_RememberLastPage
data.value: Remember and prompt last slide position

data.name: PPT_RememberLastPageHint
data.value: # When on, last page is recorded; choose Yes to jump to it.

data.name: PPT_GoToFirstPageOnReenter
data.value: Go to first slide when entering show

data.name: Advanced_TouchMultiplierHint
data.value: Adjust when finger-touch shows circle eraser or palm eraser is much larger than palm

data.name: Advanced_TouchMultiplierCalibrateHint
data.value: Tap with pen in the area below to estimate touch size multiplier

data.name: Advanced_EraserBindTouchMultiplier
data.value: Bind eraser to touch size multiplier

data.name: Advanced_EraserBindTouchHint
data.value: # BoundsWidth is used as contact area threshold

data.name: Advanced_LogRotateHint
data.value: # Log files over 512 KB are auto-deleted. With date save, logs go to Logs folder; folder is cleared when over 5 MB.

data.name: Advanced_FullScreenHelperHint
data.value: # Thanks to lindexi for FullScreenHelper; reduces taskbar pop-up and supports multi-monitor fullscreen. Disable if you see odd issues; restart ICC to apply.

data.name: Advanced_AvoidFullScreenHelperHint
data.value: # Avoid canvas fullscreen; may fix taskbar not on top and Win11 taskbar unclickable. Can cause floating bar offset with AppBar on left/top. Restart ICC to apply.

data.name: Backup_Desc
data.value: # You can manually back up current settings or restore previous backups; backups are also created automatically before updates.

data.name: ConfigProfiles_Desc
data.value: # Selecting a profile switches and hot-reloads it; \"Save as\" saves current settings as a new profile.

data.name: AutoFold_IgnoreEasiNoteDesktopAnno
data.value: Ignore EN5 desktop annotation window when auto folding

data.name: AutoFold_OldZyBoard
data.value: Auto fold when entering old ZhongYuan whiteboard

data.name: Automation_KeepFoldAfterExitHint
data.value: # When on, apps that trigger auto fold will stay folded even after they exit.

data.name: AutoKill_PptToolsHint
data.value: # Killing PPT tools disables Seewo classroom helper. Delete Office.dll in its install folder to stop the PPT toolbar without auto kill.

data.name: AutoKill_HiteAfterKillEnterAnnotation
data.value: Enter annotation after killing Hite screen writing

data.name: AutoKill_SeewoDesktop2AnnoHint
data.value: # Seewo Desktop 2.0 annotation is 64-bit so ICC (32-bit) cannot inspect it deeply; only process name DesktopAnnotation is matched. If you have another app with the same name, keep this off.

data.name: AutoKill_InkCanvasIC
data.value: Auto kill Ink Canvas and IC+

data.name: FileAssoc_Desc
data.value: Manage .icstk file association so double-click opens in Ink Canvas.

data.name: FloatingInterceptor_Desc
data.value: Detect and block floating windows from similar software

data.name: Storage_AutoSaveHint
data.value: # When on, strokes are auto-saved at the set interval, only when canvas is visible and has ink.

data.name: Storage_SaveFullPageHint
data.value: # When on, auto/manual saves store all pages in fullscreen; multiple pages are packed in one archive (whiteboard strokes open only in whiteboard mode; PPT strokes only in slide show mode).

data.name: Storage_SaveAsXmlHint
data.value: # When on, strokes are saved as XML (ISF) for easier inspection and editing.

data.name: Storage_PathSetToD
data.value: Set save path to D:\Ink Canvas

data.name: Storage_PathPermissionHint
data.value: # Please ensure the save folder is writable.

data.name: Storage_AutoDeleteTitle
data.value: Auto delete old strokes and screenshots

data.name: Storage_AutoDeleteHint
data.value: # When on, all .icstk and .png files in the auto-save folder may be deleted!

data.name: FoldMode_ExitToAnnotation
data.value: Switch to annotation when exiting fold mode

data.name: FoldMode_ExitToAnnotationHint
data.value: # When on, exiting fold mode switches back to annotation for convenience.

data.name: FoldMode_AutoFoldAfterPPT
data.value: Auto fold floating bar after PPT show

data.name: FoldMode_AutoFoldAfterPPTHint
data.value: # When on, floating bar is auto-folded after exiting PPT slide show.

data.name: FoldMode_AutoFoldAfterWhiteboardHint
data.value: # When on, exiting whiteboard folds back to sidebar.

data.name: Random_ShowEditNamesButton
data.value: Show button to edit name list

data.name: Random_ML_AvoidRepeat
data.value: Use machine learning to avoid repeats

data.name: Random_ML_Hint
data.value: # ML analyzes recent roll-call history to avoid repeating the same students.

data.name: About_PrivacyCheckboxPrefix
data.value: I have read and agree to the

data.name: About_LicenseHint
data.value: # Before using or distributing this software, you must be aware of the related open-source licenses. This software is based on https://github.com/WXRIW/Ink-Canvas.

data.name: About_LicenseTitle
data.value: This software, ICA and Ink Canvas are all open sourced under a license

data.name: About_LicenseBody
data.value: The strong copyleft license requires that complete source code and modifications of the licensed work (including large works using it) be provided under the same license. Copyright and license notices must be retained. Contributors explicitly grant patent rights.

data.name: Advanced_EdgeGestureUtilHint_Part1
data.value: # EdgeGestureUtil is newly introduced in ICC to temporarily block edge gestures when using touch (e.g., on Windows 10: swipe from the left edge to Task View, from the right edge to Action Center; on Windows 11: swipe up from the bottom to open Start). It works by using

data.name: Advanced_EdgeGestureUtilHint_Part2
data.value: (When the app window is active and in full-screen mode (or an owned window is active), prevents edge gesture behavior.) If anything is abnormal, turn this option off; it should take effect immediately. (Not available on Windows 7/8.)

data.name: Advanced_ForceFullScreenHint
data.value: # When a window size change is detected, automatically uses Win32 API to set this window size to the primary monitor size (in device pixels). Turn it off if you don't need it; takes effect immediately.

data.name: Advanced_DPIChangeDetectionHint
data.value: # When a system DPI change is detected, it tries to keep FloatingBar visible. If it goes off-screen, it will attempt to move it into the visible area. (Increasing DPI may trigger this; decreasing DPI won't auto-move—adjust manually.)

data.name: Advanced_ResolutionChangeDetectionHint
data.value: # When a screen resolution change is detected, it tries to keep FloatingBar visible. If it goes off-screen, it will attempt to move it into the visible area. (Reducing resolution may trigger this; if it's still on-screen it won't auto-adjust—adjust manually.)

data.name: Board_ShapeHintLongPress
data.value: (Long-press in first row to keep selected)

data.name: Theme_Language_RestartHint
data.value: You need to restart the app for language changes to fully take effect.
